prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-20OZERPMH-STD Product Type: HAMMER_MALLET Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 20oz Rock Pick Mining Hammer, 11-inch Pointed Tip Geology Tool for Gold Prospecting Equipment and Rockhounding Description: The ASR Outdoor Rock Pick Hammer is a 11 inch pointed tip prospecting equipment tool created especially with prospectors, rock hounds, contractors and the everyday users in mind. This heavy, well-balanced, 20 ounce head weight rock hammer is fully polished and forged of one piece of high carbon steel. There are no frills or hidden agendas; it is made to take a beating and dish one out.

This is a rugged and extremely durable, field-tested geology fossil finding tool that features a unibody, one piece forged steel construction with a dual face hammer head; a square face on one end and a pointed tip rock pick on the other. The GR-20 has an overall weight of 32 ounces, and is 11.5 inches in length, the head weighs 20 ounces giving it great balance and superior power-to-weight ratio allowing you to strike with precision and drive chisels into rocks with confidence, splitting them apart while on the hunt for gold, minerals and fossils. This Rock Pick Mining Hammer is a must-have geological tool that is ideal for any beginner gold prospector, university geology student or life-long rock hounding geologist professor, alike.

The ergonomic anti-shock injection molded handle makes it comfortable to hold and gives relief while absorbing the vibrations from the constant striking of material. Added head control is benefited from the handle being constructed from a firmer rubber grip while also providing against accidental slipping while in the field.

SPECIFICATIONS:

Model: GR-20
Overall Length: 11.5"
Head Length: 7"
Overall Weight: 32oz
Head Weight: 20oz
Rubberized Grip Handle
Single Piece Forged Steel Construction


Hone in on your rock hounding and mineral gem collecting capabilities with the ASR Outdoor 20oz Rock Pick Hammer Prospector Mining Tool. This is an absolute must have for any aspiring prospector. Search Terms: gold panning equipment tools beginner geology hammer class field hamer prospector crevice tool chisel breaker sluice box gold panning kit fossil digging prospecting mining work Features: - SINGLE PIECE HIGH CARBON STEEL: Extremely durable; made from high-carbon steel; able to withstand a constant pounding whether it is for rock hounding, geology or gold prospecting - GEOLOGY ROCK PICK HAMMER: ASR Outdoor designed this specific geology hammer to provide a superior balance and power-to-weight ratio to increase swing speed and intensify striking power over similar hammers on the market - ANTI-FATIGUE RUBBER GRIP: Featuring a ergonomic molded handle designed to help reduce the pressure from the constant vibrations of repeated material striking while hunting for fossils - FIELD TESTED AND RESPECTED: Use the pointed tip to break open rock and loosen sediment while utilizing the square face of the hammer end to drive chisels into rocks to break them open - SPECIFICATIONS: Overall Length: 11.5 inches; Overall Weight: 32 oz; Head Weight: 20 oz; Material: 55 HRC High-Carbon Steel === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 20oz Rock Pick Mining Hammer, 11 inch

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 20oz Rock Pick Mining Hammer

anthropic.title_differentiation: Single Piece Forged Steel, Gold Prospecting Tool, Geology Hammer, Anti-Fatigue Grip, Field Tested

openai.title_differentiation: One Piece Forged High-Carbon Steel, Anti-Shock Rubber Grip, Dual Face Head, Pointed Tip, Chisel Driving Power
